name: White Castle Hamburgers - Sliders
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Jar Strained Beef Baby Food
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak 1/4 cup dry minced onions in 1/4 cup hot water until soft.
2. Mix 2 pounds ground beef with 3 ounces jar of strained beef baby food and 2/3 cup clear beef broth.
- Keep patties uniform using 1/4 cup meat mixture for each patty, flattened to 1/4 inch and fried quickly in 1 tablespoon oil per patty on a hot griddle.
- Make 3 or 4 holes in patties while frying.
3. Cut hot dog buns in half.
- Cut off rounded ends.
4. Fry onions under each patty as you turn to fry the second side.
5. Slip each patty into bun with 2 dill pickle chips, mustard, and catsup.
